name: PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F
description: This table will store core personal data that is not expected to vary by Legislation Code, or has need of a global value that is independent of the Legislation Code context.	Data is stored with date effectivity, but need not functionally change over time. Values that are static over time will be duplicated to each new date effective instance of a row with the same person_id.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: System generated part of the primary key. Surrogate key.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: Denormalized record of the effective_start_date of the earliest row for this person_id. Establishes the date when the person was created on the system.

columns.Name: APPLICANT_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Unique number for people who are applicants. This is in addition to PERSON_NUMBER. Allows global tracking of applicants.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: structure definition of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: PERSON_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Number assigned to the person, to identify the person uniquely in any context, not dependent on being an employee, contingent worker, etc.

columns.Name: WAIVE_DATA_PROTECT
columns.Comments: This column is not currently used.

columns.Name: PRIMARY_EMAIL_ID
columns.Comments: Refers to the row on PER_EMAIL_ADDRESSES that should be considered the primary email of the person

columns.Name: PRIMARY_PHONE_ID
columns.Comments: Refers to the row on PER_PHONES that should be considered the primary phone of the person

columns.Name: MAILING_ADDRESS_ID
columns.Comments: Identifies which address from PER_ADDRESSES is considered the mailing address for the person (note there is a similar column at Assignment level for recording taxation address details. This address does not have to serve that purpose).

columns.Name: PRIMARY_NID_ID
columns.Comments: Refers to the row on PER_NATIONAL_IDENTIFIERS that should be considered the primary national identifier for the person.

columns.Name: PRIMARY_NID_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Denormalised value of the National ID number from the primary National ID row.
